name: @qti-editor/interactions-qti-select-point
description: QTI select-point interaction schemas, components, commands, and composer

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @qti-editor/interactions-shared build && pnpm clean && tsc --paths null
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && find src -type f -name '*.js' -delete && find src -type f -name '*.js.map' -delete && find src -type f -name '*.d.ts' -delete && find src -type f -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete
